recipe.title: Super green spaghetti
recipe.description: This vegetarian spaghetti recipe is an easy way to eat your greens. Cavolo nero, ricotta and garlic make a silky sauce for this perfect pasta dish. Delish!

steps.descr: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water...
steps.instructions: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions.

on_enter.say: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions.

steps.instructions: Meanwhile, peel the garlic. Tear the stems out of the cavolo and discard, adding the leaves and the garlic to the pasta pan for 5 minutes.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, peel the garlic. Tear the stems out of the cavolo and discard, adding the leaves and the garlic to the pasta pan for 5 minutes.

steps.descr: Pour 1½ tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil into a...
steps.instructions: Pour 1½ tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil into a blender, then finely grate in the Parmesan.

on_enter.say: Pour 1½ tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil into a blender, then finely grate in the Parmesan.

steps.descr: Use tongs to carefully transfer the cavolo leaves and...
steps.instructions: Use tongs to carefully transfer the cavolo leaves and garlic straight into the blender and blitz for a few minutes until super-smooth. Taste and season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Use tongs to carefully transfer the cavolo leaves and garlic straight into the blender and blitz for a few minutes until super-smooth. Taste and season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: Drain the pasta, reserving a mugful of cooking water
steps.instructions: Drain the pasta, reserving a mugful of cooking water.

on_enter.say: Drain the pasta, reserving a mugful of cooking water.

steps.descr: Return it to the pan and toss with the vibrant green...
steps.instructions: Return it to the pan and toss with the vibrant green sauce, loosening with a splash of reserved cooking water, if needed, then divide between your plates.

on_enter.say: Return it to the pan and toss with the vibrant green sauce, loosening with a splash of reserved cooking water, if needed, then divide between your plates.

steps.descr: Dot over the ricotta, drizzle with a tiny bit of extra...
steps.instructions: Dot over the ricotta, drizzle with a tiny bit of extra virgin olive oil, and tuck right in.

on_enter.say: Dot over the ricotta, drizzle with a tiny bit of extra virgin olive oil, and tuck right in.
